original_task.title: Stripe Billing Integration
original_task.reason: max_retries_exceeded - npm scripts missing, typecheck failures

subtasks.title: Stripe Billing - Project Setup & npm Scripts
subtasks.description: Set up proper npm scripts (build, lint, test, typecheck) and project structure for Stripe integration. Fix missing package.json scripts that caused previous failures.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build executes without errors
npm run lint executes without errors
npm run test executes without errors

subtasks.title: Stripe Billing - Core Integration
subtasks.description: Implement Stripe billing logic: customer creation, subscription management, webhook handling. Depends on project setup completion.
acceptance_criteria: Stripe customer created on agent signup

subtasks.title: Stripe Billing - Tests & Validation
subtasks.description: Add comprehensive tests for Stripe integration: unit tests for billing logic, integration tests for webhooks, validation of error scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests for billing functions (>80% coverage)

rationale: Original task failed due to missing foundation (npm scripts). Decomposing allows proper setup before complex integration work.
